_comment: B4 renewal policy example (ADR 0006). Purely local: the verifier NEVER fetches anything to evaluate this. Only the newest ArchiveTimeStamp is examined (RFC 4998 operating rule).
_max_ats_age_comment: about 7 years in seconds — renew the newest ATS before this age, well inside any realistic algorithm-ageing horizon.
_strictness_comment: 'warn' = an overdue renewal is a WARN (evidence still usable, renewal due); 'fail' = an overdue renewal is a hard FAIL (strict archives).
